title: Survive Everywhere
description: Adds recipes and items to make it easier to survive in harsh environments.
body:
Adds things that can help survival in places it would be hard like mushroom islands (or as i like to say not muchroom islands) and mesas.
Recipes include
- Battle Axe (great for defense)
- Planks (crafted from sticks)
- Logs (from mushrooms)
- Lava starter (from fire charges in a bucket)
- Fire charges (from putting charcoal on a campfire)
- Lava bucket (from putting the starter on a campfire TAKES A LONG TIME)
- Seeds (from dirt in a furnace)
